title: Implement signing backends (local nsec + NIP-46 bunker)
description: Implement the progressive-trust signing model: local test key for early iteration, local NIP-46 bunker to prove remote signing, and production NIP-46 bunker. All backends implement a common Signer trait. Verify bunker pubkey matches configured npub; fail hard on mismatch. Use zeroize for nsec memory clearing. Never log nsec, bunker URI, or derived signing material. Requirements: R6. Implementation Unit: U2.
acceptance_criteria: SignerBackend::from_config works for all three backends; bunker mismatch returns error; nsec zeroization test passes; secret redaction in signing paths verified.
close_reason: Implemented, validated, and committed

title: Implement multi-bot ClientManager and BotState
description: Manage multiple bot identities with a shared nostr-sdk relay pool. ClientManager owns a HashMap keyed by PublicKey and a bidirectional bot_id ↔ npub mapping. Each BotState holds its signer, subscriptions, and per-bot metadata. Handler registration state stays in HandlerRegistry. Requirements: R5, R7, R8. Implementation Unit: U3.
acceptance_criteria: ClientManager::new creates BotState per config; lookup by npub and bot_id works; duplicate bot_id rejected; is_authorized delegates correctly.
close_reason: Implemented multi-bot ClientManager and BotState with 100% line coverage; commit 08edfbb

title: Implement Nostr relay integration (DM send/receive)
description: Subscribe to relays for kind:1059 gift wraps #p-tagged to each bot npub. Unwrap and decrypt incoming DMs (NIP-59 → NIP-44 → rumor) and forward as agent.event. Implement send_dm pipeline: rumor → seal → gift wrap → sign → publish. Add relay reconnect/backoff and timeouts for sign/publish. Requirements: R12, R13, R14. Implementation Unit: U4.
acceptance_criteria: Incoming DM received and decrypted; outgoing reply published to relay; wrong-npub events ignored; no hangs on unreachable relay/bunker.
close_reason: Implemented Nostr relay integration for DM send/receive with 84.94% line coverage; commit 1d8cd21

title: Implement graceful shutdown and signal handling
description: Handle SIGTERM/SIGINT: send agent.status {state:"shutting_down"} to handlers, persist cursors, close relay/bunker connections, release lock, emit agent.status {state:"stopped"}, and exit. Force-exit on second signal during shutdown. Requirements: R22, R23. Implementation Unit: U9b.
acceptance_criteria: SIGTERM triggers full shutdown sequence; cursors persisted before lock release; handlers receive shutting_down then stopped; second signal force-exits.
close_reason: Implemented graceful shutdown and signal handling; main.rs 86.93% coverage; commit 56d9523

title: Implement event dispatch pipeline
description: Route incoming Nostr events to registered handlers by event type and bot identity. Collect handler responses (ack, reply, defer, ignore). Enforce per-handler rate limits (10 mutating ops/sec, burst 20) and per-bot aggregate limits. Advance event cursor only after all handlers return terminal responses or dispatch timeout expires. Isolate slow/hung handlers. Requirements: R13, R14, R16, R17, R18, R26, R27, R30. Implementation Unit: U7.
acceptance_criteria: Events fan out; ack/reply/defer/ignore handled; -32005 on 11th op/sec; cursor advances per rule; slow handler does not block others.
close_reason: Implemented event dispatch pipeline with fan-out, rate limits, and cursor advance; dispatch.rs 83.57% coverage; commit af5d45a

title: Implement daemon startup and event-loop wiring
description: Wire all components into a runnable daemon: parse CLI args, create data dir, acquire exclusive lock on daemon.lock, load config, open DB, create shared Nostr client and ClientManager, create HandlerRegistry and Dispatch, start transport, and enter tokio::select! event loop. Emit agent.status notifications (initializing, ready). Handle lock-held, invalid config, bunker mismatch, and unreachable relay cases. Requirements: R21, R23, R24, R31. Implementation Unit: U9a.
acceptance_criteria: Daemon starts and emits ready; lock-held exits cleanly; invalid config/bunker mismatch exit with clear errors; unreachable relay logs warning.
close_reason: Implemented daemon startup and event-loop wiring; main.rs 87.35% coverage; commit 32af77a

title: Implement handler registration and capability model
description: Handlers register via handler.register, declaring bot_ids, event_types, and capabilities. Daemon validates against config and assigns a server-generated UUIDv4 handler_id. Maintain a fan-out routing table in HandlerRegistry. Enforce per-call capability checks for agent.send_dm, agent.set_profile, and agent.error. Unregister handlers on connection drop. Requirements: R15, R16, R17, R18. Implementation Unit: U6.
acceptance_criteria: Server-generated UUID returned; unknown bot_id rejected; fan-out works; cross-bot mutating calls return -32006.
close_reason: Implemented, validated, and committed

title: Implement SQLite persistence and cursor recovery
description: Persist event cursors, handler registrations, and bot configuration in SQLite agent.db using WAL mode and synchronous=NORMAL. Cursors include an npub column for identity validation. On restart, validate stored npub against config; reset mismatched cursors. Advance cursors only after terminal responses or timeout. Requirements: R19, R20, R27. Implementation Unit: U8.
acceptance_criteria: Database migrations run; cursor round-trip with npub works; npub mismatch resets cursor; restart resumes without duplicates under cursor-advance rule.
close_reason: Implemented, validated, and committed

title: Implement JSON-RPC transport layer (Unix socket + HTTP)
description: Expose JSON-RPC 2.0 over a Unix domain socket ($DATA_DIR/pacto-bot-api.sock, 0o600) and optional localhost HTTP (127.0.0.1:9800). Use newline-delimited JSON frames with a 1 MB max frame size. Generate/load a CSPRNG X-Pacto-Bot-Secret token (0o600 file) for HTTP. Bind HTTP to loopback only; reject missing/wrong tokens with 401. Clean stale sockets on startup and enforce connection/idle limits. Requirements: R1, R2, R3, R24, R28. Implementation Unit: U5.
acceptance_criteria: Unix socket accepts connections with 0o600 permissions; HTTP binds 127.0.0.1 only and enforces secret token; 1 MB frames dropped; idle connections closed.
close_reason: Implemented, validated, and committed

title: Create initial error types and config loading foundation
description: Implement the core error enum DaemonError and the TOML config parsing/validation layer needed before other modules can be built. Deliverables: src/errors.rs with JSON-RPC error-code mapping, src/config.rs with DaemonConfig/BotConfig/SigningConfig structs, env-var and path expansion, duplicate bot_id validation, config file permission checks, and unit tests. Covers R7, R8, and U1.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes for config and error modules; invalid config cases (duplicate bot_id, loose permissions, missing fields) return clear errors
close_reason: Verified: src/errors.rs has DaemonError with JSON-RPC mapping, src/config.rs has DaemonConfig/BotConfig/SigningConfig with env/path expansion, duplicate bot_id validation, permission checks; cargo test config::tests and errors::tests pass

title: Set up schema-first contract artifacts and codegen
description: Establish the schemas/ directory as the canonical machine-readable contract and wire the cargo xtask codegen runner. Deliverables: schemas/config.json, schemas/jsonrpc.json, schemas/metrics.json, schemas/service-compatibility.json, xtask/src/main.rs with a codegen command, generated Rust type stubs, and tests/schema_sync.rs that fails when schemas and generated code diverge. This satisfies R32 and U13.
acceptance_criteria: schemas/ contains four JSON files; cargo xtask codegen runs and writes generated types; cargo test includes schema_sync.rs
close_reason: Verified: schemas/ has config.json/jsonrpc.json/metrics.json/service-compatibility.json, xtask/src/main.rs implements codegen, tests/schema_sync.rs enforces sync; cargo test --test schema_sync passes

title: Initialize and scaffold pacto-bot-api Rust project
description: Create the foundational Rust crate structure for the pacto-bot-api daemon. This is greenfield work: no src/, Cargo.toml, or build files exist yet. Deliverables: Cargo.toml with binary targets (pacto-bot-api and pacto-bot-admin), src/ module tree (main.rs, admin.rs, config.rs, errors.rs, etc.), basic CLI argument parsing with clap, initial TOML config loader with serde, example config file, and a passing cargo check. This unblocks all subsequent implementation units U1–U15.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check passes; both binary targets resolve; src/ module tree matches plan section 'Crate Structure'; example config exists and parses
notes: Reopened for validation of generated scaffold files
close_reason: Verified: Cargo.toml declares both binaries, src/ module tree matches plan, example config exists and parses, cargo build --bins passes

title: Fix clippy dead-code warnings in test support modules
description: Quality gate cleanup: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings currently fails because tests/support/mock_bunker.rs, tests/support/mock_relay.rs, and tests/support/secret_scan.rs expose public fields/methods that are not yet consumed by any test. Either wire them into existing tests or mark the genuinely unused support scaffolding with allow(dead_code)/#[expect(dead_code)] so the linting gate passes. Preserve the support API surface since it will be used by upcoming integration tests.
acceptance_criteria: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings passes; cargo test still passes
close_reason: Already fixed in commit 15dfc7d: module-level #![allow(dead_code)] added to support modules; cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings passes and cargo test passes.

title: Implement end-to-end integration tests and reference Python handler
description: Provide Docker-free integration tests using in-process mock relay and mock bunker. Cover full DM round-trip over Unix socket and HTTP, multi-bot multiplexing, daemon restart recovery, handler fan-out, and failure isolation. Provide a reference Python echo handler and pytest fixtures. Requirements: R1–R31, R33. Implementation Units: U10, U11.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes in-process integration suite; reference Python echo handler works; pytest example passes.
close_reason: Implemented Docker-free end-to-end integration tests with in-process mock relay, fixed Unix-socket handler connection wiring so daemon can push agent.event/agent.status notifications, added multi-bot and fan-out tests, created mock bunker placeholder, and added Python reference echo handler with pytest fixtures. cargo test: 155 passed; pytest: 5 passed; clippy and fmt clean.

title: Implement secret-redaction and security-invariant tests
description: Prove sensitive values (nsec, bunker URI, HTTP token) never leak through logs, JSON-RPC errors, compiled binary strings, or core-dump simulation. Add deny.toml/clippy.toml enforcement, secret_scan.rs helpers, and tests/secret_redaction.rs. Requirements: R6, R34. Implementation Unit: U15.
acceptance_criteria: Secret-redaction suite passes; strings target/release/pacto-bot-api contains no synthetic markers; clippy/deny forbid plain String for secrets.
close_reason: Implemented secret-redaction and security-invariant tests; commit 730e900

title: Implement admin CLI: bot creation and profile publishing
description: Implement pacto-bot-admin new <bot_id> to generate a Nostr keypair and emit a config snippet; implement publish-profile <bot_id> to publish a kind:0 profile event with bot:true and capabilities to the bot's relays. Support interactive and scripted modes. Never log the generated nsec. Requirements: R8, R9. Implementation Unit: U12a.
acceptance_criteria: new outputs valid config snippet; publish-profile emits kind:0 event with bot:true; nsec not leaked in logs.
close_reason: Implemented admin CLI new and publish-profile; commit fb1b860

title: Implement diagnostics, metrics, dev-env compatibility, and last-run report
description: Add structured, machine-parseable health and metrics. Implement agent.metrics JSON-RPC method/notification, pacto-bot-admin diagnose --format json, and periodic flushing of $DATA_DIR/reports/latest.json. Probe service versions when running against pacto-dev-env and warn on compatibility mismatch. Requirements: R31, R35, R36, R37. Implementation Unit: U14.
acceptance_criteria: agent.metrics returns stable keys; diagnose --format json parses; latest.json flushed on shutdown and periodically; version mismatch warns.
close_reason: Implemented diagnostics, metrics aggregation, and last-run report with 97.28% line coverage; commit 1481919

title: Implement admin CLI: state migration, validation, and token rotation
description: Implement export <bot_id> (JSON state dump with metadata and split-brain warning, no nsec), import <bot_id> <state.json>, validate-config, and rotate-http-token. Refuse export/import if daemon.lock is held. Requirements: R10, R11, R25, R29. Implementation Unit: U12c.
acceptance_criteria: Export/import round-trip works; lock-held refused; validate-config reports issues; rotation atomically rewrites token.
close_reason: Verified: src/admin.rs implements export/import/validate-config/rotate-http-token with lock-file refusal; cargo test --test admin_cli_migration passes (10 tests)

title: Implement admin CLI: bunker testing
description: Implement pacto-bot-admin test-bunker <bot_id> to read config, connect to the bot's bunker, request get_public_key, and verify the pubkey matches the configured npub. Exit 0 on match, non-zero on mismatch or unreachable bunker. Requirements: R6. Implementation Unit: U12b.
acceptance_criteria: Valid bunker exits 0; pubkey mismatch exits non-zero; unreachable bunker exits non-zero.
close_reason: Verified: src/admin.rs implements test-bunker with live get_public_key verification; cargo test --test admin_cli_bunker passes (7 tests)

title: Add Rust agent skills for Claude, Cursor, and OMP
description: Install Rust-focused agent skills (rust-best-practices, rust-async-patterns, rust-testing, rust-patterns, m15-anti-pattern, cargo-fuzz, cargo-nextest, ce-compound, ce-compound-refresh) from skills.sh for Claude Code, Cursor, and Oh My Pi. Vendor them into .claude/skills, .agents/skills, and .omp/skills. Update AGENTS.md with an Agent Skills section and DEVELOPMENT.md with project-specific guidance (cargo nextest, no pacto-dev-env references).
acceptance_criteria: Skills installed and copied to .claude/skills, .agents/skills, .omp/skills; skills-lock.json created; AGENTS.md lists skills; DEVELOPMENT.md is accurate for pacto-bot-api; changes committed to add-rust-agent-skills branch
close_reason: Installed skills, updated docs, committed and pushed to add-rust-agent-skills branch

title: Document project overview and developer onboarding
description: Create README.md, DEVELOPMENT.md, and supporting docs that explain the 5 Ws (who, what, when, where, why), how to use the daemon and admin CLI, and how to set up a development environment. These files replace ad-hoc onboarding with a single source of truth for operators and contributors.
acceptance_criteria: README.md and DEVELOPMENT.md exist and cover: project purpose and 5 Ws, quickstart for running daemon and admin CLI, config file explanation with security warnings, development setup (Rust toolchain, cargo commands, test modes), and links to schemas/ and plan docs
close_reason: README.md and DEVELOPMENT.md created, verified cargo check and cargo test pass

title: Configure Rust linting and security tooling
description: Add linting and audit configuration that enforces the security posture from the plan, especially secret hygiene. Deliverables: clippy.toml with custom lints forbidding plain String for secrets, deny.toml for cargo-deny audit gates, and initial CI-friendly verification commands. This supports R34 and U15.
acceptance_criteria: cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes on scaffolded code; cargo deny check runs without configuration errors
close_reason: Implemented and committed earlier
